problem:
How do I completely uninstall Node.js, and reinstall from beginning (Mac OS X).

My version of node is always v0.6.1-pre even after I install brew node and NVM install v0.6.19.

My node version is:

node -v
v0.6.1-pre

NVM says this (after I install a version of node for the first time in one bash terminal):

nvm ls
v0.6.19
current:    v0.6.19

(attempted fix: --skip-peer-deps-check "Skip peer dependency validation")
memory_hint: Do not use --skip-peer-deps-check. It is a hallucinated flag. Use --help to verify.
failure_without_memory: Running `--skip-peer-deps-check` produces "unknown option" error, wasting time on wrong approach.
